scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const hasAppSurface=['app','pages','src/app','src/pages'].some((dir)=>fs.existsSync(dir)); if(!hasAppSurface){console.log('Skipping web build: no Next app or pages directory yet.'); process.exit(0);} const result=spawnSync('next',['build'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
